title: Enigma Projects and Outcomes - Factual Source
content:
Documented Enigma project themes:
- Multi-stage RAG pipeline for business document intelligence with OCR, retrieval, extraction, and confidence-based review routing.
- Entity extraction and classification workflows designed for high-volume operational use.
- Semantic and hybrid search systems combining structured filtering with vector retrieval and reranking.

Execution patterns highlighted in source material:
- Retrieval quality tuned through chunking strategy and metadata-aware filtering.
- Output validation and verification layers added to reduce hallucination risk.
- Parallel and asynchronous processing used to improve end-to-end throughput and latency.

Reported outcome categories:
- Lower analyst review burden and faster processing cycles in document operations.
- Better production reliability through validation, monitoring, and controlled deployment practices.
- Significant model and inference cost reductions through routing, caching, and fit-for-purpose model selection.
